name: Bonedust Collective
specialty: Experts in stealth and infiltration, known for their ability to navigate the treacherous rifts and bypass security in the Undercity's key locations

members.name: Rynn Vesh
members.note: A former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, her past allegiance often raises eyebrows among peers

members.name: Zephyr Lyth
members.note: His unnatural agility and keen senses make him the perfect scout, but his mysterious origins remain a topic of debate

members.name: Thoren Stonebreaker
members.note: A veteran of the Wardens of Ash, his battle-scarred face is a testament to countless skirmishes, and his loyalty is unquestionable

members.name: Nevra Shadowdancer
members.note: Her silver eyes and fluid movements make her a formidable negotiator, but her history with the Serpent Choir leaves some wary

visual: The Bonedust Collective wear all black, with a distinctive Obsidian Lotus symbol emblazoned on their chests. They move with a purpose, rarely raising their voices in public, preferring the art of subtlety over brute force.
reputation_note: Rumored to have ties with the Obsidian Lotus, the Bonedust Collective is a crew to be wary of. Yet, their reputation for getting the job done, no matter the odds, ensures they remain in high demand
